title: Jack Black Edition
description: Replaces basic Minecraft panorama to Jack Black (Steve) from Minecraft Trailer. Basically just a new meme that I added to Minecraft as panorama. Also you could use this resourcepack in your videos
body:
**Adds Jack Black (Steve) as a miner from Minecraft trailer as panorama** 
So, I've added Jack Black to the game because of the new Minecraft meme "As a child I yearned for the mines". I've made this resourcepack for fun, you can use this in your videos or put it in memes. To understand why I made this resoucepack you could check out official Minecraft trailer on Youtube or check out memes about the trailer lol
